description: Post-P59 HTTP API verification closure. lottery_api server started after applying torch optional-dependency guards. All replay endpoints verified over live HTTP on port 8002.

dependency_diagnosis.root_cause: lottery_api/models/unified_predictor.py imported meta_stacking_predictor and diffusion_predictor at module level; both import torch unconditionally.
dependency_diagnosis.existing_pattern: unified_predictor.py already guarded sota_predictor and mab_ensemble with try/except ImportError. Same pattern applied to meta_stacking_predictor and diffusion_predictor.
dependency_diagnosis.secondary_blocker: python-multipart missing (required by routes/data.py for file upload route). Installed as lightweight standard FastAPI dependency (no heavy deps).
dependency_diagnosis.fix_applied: Option A: Optional dependency guard — torch-dependent predictors disabled at startup when torch missing; prediction endpoints would fail at runtime but replay endpoints remain healthy.

fix_applied.change: Wrapped 'from .meta_stacking_predictor import MetaStackingPredictor' and 'from .diffusion_predictor import LotteryDiffusionGenerator' in try/except ImportError blocks. Guarded runtime instantiation with 'if MetaStackingPredictor is not None' checks.
fix_applied.risk: NONE for replay routes. Prediction routes that use MetaStackingPredictor/LotteryDiffusionGenerator will degrade gracefully when torch is missing.
fix_applied.secondary_fix: python-multipart installed via pip for form-data parsing in routes/data.py

strategies_endpoint.note: fourier30_markov30_2bet is a production-apply strategy, not a lifecycle-registered strategy. It is correctly visible in /api/replay/summary and /api/replay/history.
